theme: Light/Dark mode responsive. Admin dashboard defaults to Light. Public profile supports both based on system preference.
archetype: Organic & Earthy mixed with Luxury to establish trust (LGPD) and a premium salon/barber experience.

typography.headings: Cabinet Grotesk or Playfair Display for premium, distinctive headers (no Inter or standard sans for headings).
typography.body: Satoshi or IBM Plex Sans for legibility in dense data.
typography.guidelines: Never use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Maintain a max jump of 2 tailwind steps between heading and subheading.

colors.guidelines: Do not use pure black or gray; tint neutral grays warmly. Avoid teal green/blue. Do not use transparent backgrounds under readable content.

grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4. High density, every pixel utilized.
grids.profile_gallery: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 with wide gap-6 for artful display.
grids.guidelines: Always mobile-first (grid-cols-1). Use bento-style layouts. Ensure items stretch correctly.

layouts.spacing: Generous. p-6 or p-8 for containers. Extra padding on bordered elements to avoid text collision.
layouts.dashboard: Flat, structured, 1px borders, subtle or no shadows until interaction.
layouts.profile_page: Vertical mobile-first stack. Avoid deep menu nesting. Ensure thumb-friendly action buttons (bottom 60%).

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Glassmorphism for floating headers (backdrop-blur-xl, white/70). Solid flat colors for dashboard to avoid data refraction.
visual_enhancers.borders: Concentric nested radii. Crisp inner strokes on glass elements.

motion.hover_states: Hover must change text color (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
motion.transitions: Explicit transition properties (transition-transform transition-opacity), NEVER transition-all.

accessibility.contrast: APCA preferred or WCAG AA minimum. Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast (use bg-black/50 overlay max).
accessibility.images: All gallery images MUST have descriptive alt-text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='view-profile-btn').

avatars.description: Professional portraits for the barber/stylist profiles

gallery.description: Haircut and salon work examples for the professional gallery section

3d_libraries.usage: Not recommended for this data-centric and security-focused P0 fix. Use simple 2D Framer Motion (if applicable) for standard transitions.

component_name.ProfessionalProfileView: Public read-only profile showing bio, gallery, and contact links (no phone/email).
component_name.CatalogProfileLink: Conditional button linking from main catalog to the professional profile.

instructions_to_main_agent: Address P0 Data Leak immediately: Remove 'USING (true)' from profiles table RLS.
Implement granular DB policies: Superadmin (read all), Admin (read own tenant), Owner (read self). Expose public fields via an RPC/View.
Professionals must not see client email/phone even in their own bookings.
Add immutable DB audit logs for invites, promotions, commissions, and revocations. Require mandatory reasons.
Create 'professional_profiles' table: id, user_id, slug, bio, portfolio_url, gallery_urls, created_at. Link optionally in memberships.
Create public profile route at '/profile/cutsync-security-p0' using the new table data. Must be mobile-optimized.
In the public catalog, display name, avatar, title, specialties, and a conditional 'View Profile' link.
Implement negative tests for RLS and LGPD validations.
Use standard React Native Expo patterns in `.js` files, applying NativeWind/Tailwind appropriately.
Do NOT use HTML `<select>` or standard inputs if cross-platform Shadcn/Expo alternatives exist.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the mold with layered elements, depth, and z-index hierarchy.
NEVER center align the app container; it disrupts reading flow.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical for a premium feel.
Use modern pill-shaped or sharp buttons with specific hover/focus interaction states.
DO NOT apply 'transition: all'. Target specific properties.
DO NOT use AI assistant emojis for icons. Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react.
NEVER use placeholder URLs; only use the exact images provided in the media section.
Ensure ALL interactive elements have kebab-case data-testid attributes for testing.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Start mobile-first, prioritizing thumb zones for primary CTAs (bottom 60% of screen).
Use progressive disclosure: hide advanced settings behind secondary menus to reduce clutter.
Ensure touch targets are a minimum of 44x44 pixels.
Integrate 'Glassmorphism' properly: saturated blur with a 1px delicate inner stroke, avoiding muddy gray overlays.
Maintain strict APCA/WCAG contrast ratios, particularly for typography overlaid on images.
